game_info.title: Letter Drop Physics
game_info.concept:
How does a p fall?

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/supertype/id1349292121

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

How does a p fall?
How much does an r weigh?
And how does the dot over an i sound?

· · · s u p e r t y p e · · ·

(super many, over 130 levels)
(super relaxing, zen-like gameplay)
(super smooth, self-generating sound track)
game_info.description:
Welcome to **Letter Drop Physics**.
In this puzzle game, your words possess physical weight and shape.
Your goal is to collect all the golden stars in each level using falling letters.
Type characters to construct physical structures—lines, ramps, weights, or hooks.
Press ENTER to bring your letters to life and watch gravity take over.
Experiment with different letters: 'o' rolls, 'l' creates towers, '_' makes bridges, and 'p' is top-heavy!
game_info.controls:
Key A-Z: Type letters into the spawn queue
Key SPACE: Type a space (gap between letters)
Key BACKSPACE: Delete the last typed letter
Key ENTER: Spawn the typed letters (Start Simulation)
Key R: Restart the current level (clear letters)
Key ESC: Pause / Unpause game

TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate typing a string of characters (e.g., "hello") and check if the input buffer in the game state reflects these characters.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game state input string should match the typed characters "hello".
TEST_1.strategy: Simulate typing a string of characters (e.g., "hello") and check if the input buffer in the game state reflects these characters.
TEST_1.expected: The game state input string should match the typed characters "hello".

TEST_2.strategy_description: Type a character "a" and press ENTER. Observe if the game phase switches to "SIMULATING" and if an entity is added to the physics world.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game phase becomes "SIMULATING", and the entity count increases by at least 1.
TEST_2.strategy: Type a character "a" and press ENTER. Observe if the game phase switches to "SIMULATING" and if an entity is added to the physics world.
TEST_2.expected: Game phase becomes "SIMULATING", and the entity count increases by at least 1.

test_2_ModeBtn.expected: Game phase becomes "SIMULATING", and the entity count increases by at least 1.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Spawn a letter "o" in the air. Wait for 60 frames.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The Y position of the letter should be greater than its starting Y position (it fell).
TEST_3.strategy: Spawn a letter "o" in the air. Wait for 60 frames.
TEST_3.expected: The Y position of the letter should be greater than its starting Y position (it fell).

TEST_4.strategy_description: Spawn a letter above a platform. Wait for it to fall and settle (approx 120 frames).
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The letter's vertical velocity should approach 0, and its position should be resting on top of the platform.
TEST_4.strategy: Spawn a letter above a platform. Wait for it to fall and settle (approx 120 frames).
TEST_4.expected: The letter's vertical velocity should approach 0, and its position should be resting on top of the platform.

test_4_ModeBtn.expected: The letter's vertical velocity should approach 0, and its position should be resting on top of the platform.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Overwrite the player's input position to be exactly on top of the target star, then spawn. This guarantees a collision.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The game should detect the collection of the star and advance the level index or show the win screen.
TEST_5.strategy: Overwrite the player's input position to be exactly on top of the target star, then spawn. This guarantees a collision.
TEST_5.expected: The game should detect the collection of the star and advance the level index or show the win screen.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Start a simulation, wait a few frames, then press 'R'.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Game phase should return to "PLANNING", entities should be cleared, and the level should be reset.
TEST_6.strategy: Start a simulation, wait a few frames, then press 'R'.
TEST_6.expected: Game phase should return to "PLANNING", entities should be cleared, and the level should be reset.

TEST_7.strategy_description: During simulation, press ESC. Wait 10 frames, then press ESC again.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Game phase should toggle to "PAUSED" and then back to previous state. Delta time should be 0 or logic skipped during pause.
TEST_7.strategy: During simulation, press ESC. Wait 10 frames, then press ESC again.
